passage_title: Flawed Beauty: The Problem with Toughened Glass

sentences.sentence: On 2nd August 1999, a particularly hot day in the town of Cirencester in the UK, a large pane of toughened glass in the roof of a shopping centre at Bishops Walk shattered without warning and fell from its frame.
sentences.translation: 1999年8月2日，英国赛伦塞斯特镇天气格外炎热，毕晓普斯步行街一座购物中心屋顶上的一大片钢化玻璃突然碎裂，并从框架中坠落。

structure.text: a particularly hot day in the town of Cirencester in the UK
a large pane of toughened glass in the roof of a shopping centre at Bishops Walk
shattered without warning and fell from its frame

difficult_points: a particularly hot day... 是日期的同位语，补充当天的天气和地点。
shattered 和 fell 并列作谓语，without warning 表示事发突然。

sentences.sentence: When fragments were analysed by experts at the giant glass manufacturer Pilkington, which had made the pane, they found that minute crystals of nickel sulphide trapped inside the glass had almost certainly caused the failure.
sentences.translation: 这块玻璃的碎片由大型玻璃制造商皮尔金顿的专家分析后发现，困在玻璃内部的微小硫化镍晶体几乎肯定导致了这次事故。

structure.text: When fragments were analysed by experts at the giant glass manufacturer Pilkington
that minute crystals of nickel sulphide trapped inside the glass had almost certainly caused the failure

difficult_points: which had made the pane 修饰 Pilkington，说明该公司制造了这块玻璃。
trapped inside the glass 是过去分词短语，修饰 crystals；found 后接 that 宾语从句。

sentences.sentence: 'The glass industry is aware of the issue,' says Brian Waldron, chairman of the standards committee at the Glass and Glazing Federation, a British trade association, and standards development officer at Pilkington.
sentences.translation: “玻璃行业知道这个问题，”布赖恩·沃尔德伦说；他是英国行业协会玻璃与玻璃装配联合会标准委员会主席，同时担任皮尔金顿的标准开发官员。

structure.text: chairman of the standards committee at the Glass and Glazing Federation

difficult_points: 引号中的话在前，says Brian Waldron 是后置的报道语。
chairman... 和 standards development officer 都是 Brian Waldron 的同位语身份说明。

sentences.sentence: But he insists that cases are few and far between.
sentences.translation: 但他坚持认为，这类事件很少发生。

structure.text: that cases are few and far between

difficult_points: that 从句作 insists 的宾语，说明他的判断内容。
few and far between 是固定表达，表示零星而罕见。

sentences.sentence: 'It's a very rare phenomenon,' he says.
sentences.translation: “这是一种非常罕见的现象，”他说。
difficult_points: it 指前文所说的钢化玻璃自发破裂现象。
phenomenon 是正式语体中的“现象”，报道语 he says 后置。

sentences.sentence: Others disagree.
sentences.translation: 其他人并不同意。
difficult_points: Others 泛指持不同意见的其他专家。
disagree 是不及物动词，此处省略了具体不同意的内容。

sentences.sentence: 'On average I see about one or two buildings a month suffering from nickel sulphide related failures,' says Barrie Josie, a consultant engineer involved in the Bishops Walk investigation.
sentences.translation: “平均每个月，我都会见到大约一两栋建筑遭受与硫化镍有关的失效问题，”参与毕晓普斯步行街调查的咨询工程师巴里·乔西说。

structure.text: about one or two buildings a month
suffering from nickel sulphide related failures
a consultant engineer involved in the Bishops Walk investigation

difficult_points: see + 宾语 + doing 表示“看到某对象正处于某种状态”，suffering 修饰 buildings。
a month 表示频率；involved... 是过去分词短语，修饰 consultant engineer。

sentences.sentence: Other experts tell of similar experiences.
sentences.translation: 其他专家也讲述了类似经历。
difficult_points: tell of 是正式表达，意为讲述或提到。
similar 修饰 experiences，承接上文的案例。

sentences.sentence: Tony Wilmott of London-based consulting engineers Sandberg, and Simon Armstrong at CladTech Associates in Hampshire both say they know of hundreds of cases.
sentences.translation: 伦敦咨询工程公司桑德伯格的托尼·威尔莫特，以及汉普郡克莱德泰克联合公司的西蒙·阿姆斯特朗都说，他们知道数百起这样的案例。

structure.text: Tony Wilmott of London-based consulting engineers Sandberg, and Simon Armstrong at CladTech Associates in Hampshire
they know of hundreds of cases

difficult_points: 两个并列的人名构成复合主语，因此用 both say。
know of 表示“听说过、知道有”，不等同于亲自掌握全部细节。

sentences.sentence: 'What you hear is only the tip of the iceberg,' says Trevor Ford, a glass expert at Resolve Engineering in Brisbane, Queensland.
sentences.translation: “你听到的只是冰山一角，”昆士兰州布里斯班Resolve Engineering公司的玻璃专家特雷弗·福特说。

structure.text: only the tip of the iceberg
a glass expert at Resolve Engineering in Brisbane, Queensland

difficult_points: What you hear 是融合关系代词引导的名词性从句，整体作主语。
the tip of the iceberg 是习语，表示可见部分远小于实际情况。

sentences.sentence: He believes the reason is simple: 'No-one wants bad press.'
sentences.translation: 他认为原因很简单：“没有人想要负面报道。”
difficult_points: believe 后的 the reason is simple 省略了 that。
冒号后的话具体解释原因；bad press 指负面媒体报道。

sentences.sentence: Toughened glass is found everywhere, from cars and bus shelters to the windows, walls and roofs of thousands of buildings around the world.
sentences.translation: 钢化玻璃随处可见，从汽车和公交候车亭，到世界各地数千座建筑的窗户、墙壁和屋顶。

structure.text: from cars and bus shelters to the windows, walls and roofs of thousands of buildings around the world

difficult_points: is found 是被动表达，表示这种材料被广泛使用。
from...to... 列举其使用范围，而非地点移动。

sentences.sentence: It's easy to see why.
sentences.translation: 很容易看出其中的原因。
difficult_points: it 是形式主语，真正的主语是不定式 to see why。
why 指代钢化玻璃广泛使用的原因。

expressions.text: it is easy to see why

sentences.sentence: This glass has five times the strength of standard glass, and when it does break it shatters into tiny cubes rather than large, razor-sharp shards.
sentences.translation: 这种玻璃的强度是普通玻璃的五倍；而当它真的破裂时，会碎成细小的立方体，而不是又大又锋利的碎片。

structure.text: has five times the strength of standard glass
and when it does break it shatters into tiny cubes rather than large, razor-sharp shards

difficult_points: five times the strength 表示“强度是五倍”，times 后接名词短语。
does break 中 does 用于强调；rather than 对比两种碎裂形态。

sentences.sentence: Architects love it because large panels can be bolted together to make transparent walls, and turning it into ceilings and floors is almost as easy.
sentences.translation: 建筑师喜欢它，因为大块玻璃可以用螺栓拼接成透明墙体，把它制成天花板和地板也同样容易。

structure.text: because large panels can be bolted together to make transparent walls
turning it into ceilings and floors

difficult_points: because 从句说明喜爱的原因，其中 can be bolted 是被动语态。
turning it into... 是动名词短语作第二个并列分句的主语。

sentences.sentence: It is made by heating a sheet of ordinary glass to about 620°C to soften it slightly, allowing its structure to expand, and then cooling it rapidly with jets of cold air.
sentences.translation: 它的制作方法是：将一片普通玻璃加热至约620摄氏度，使其略微软化、结构膨胀，然后用冷空气喷流快速冷却。

structure.text: by heating a sheet of ordinary glass to about 620°C
and then cooling it rapidly with jets of cold air

difficult_points: by + doing 说明制作方法，heating 和 cooling 是并列步骤。
allowing 是现在分词，说明加热软化所带来的结果；to soften 表示目的。

sentences.sentence: This causes the outer layer of the pane to contract and solidify before the interior.
sentences.translation: 这会使玻璃板的外层比内部更早收缩并凝固。

structure.text: the outer layer of the pane

difficult_points: This 指前句所述的快速冷却过程。
cause + 宾语 + to do 表示使某物发生变化，before the interior 省略了 solidifies。

sentences.sentence: When the interior finally solidifies and shrinks, it exerts a pull on the outer layer that leaves it in permanent compression and produces a tensile force inside the glass.
sentences.translation: 当内部最终凝固并收缩时，它会拉扯外层，使外层长期处于压缩状态，同时在玻璃内部产生拉应力。

structure.text: When the interior finally solidifies and shrinks
exerts a pull on the outer layer
that leaves it in permanent compression and produces a tensile force inside the glass

difficult_points: it 指 the interior；when 从句描述内部凝固收缩的时间。
that 修饰 a pull，leaves 与 produces 并列说明这股拉力的作用。

sentences.sentence: As cracks propagate best in materials under tension, the compressive force on the surface must be overcome before the pane will break, making it more resistant to cracking.
sentences.translation: 由于裂缝最容易在受拉材料中扩展，必须先克服表面的压缩力，玻璃板才会破裂，这使它更耐开裂。

structure.text: As cracks propagate best in materials under tension
the compressive force on the surface
making it more resistant to cracking

difficult_points: As 在句首表示原因；under tension 修饰 materials。
must be overcome 是被动语态，making 分词短语概括前面机理带来的结果。

sentences.sentence: The problem starts when glass contains nickel sulphide impurities.
sentences.translation: 当玻璃中含有硫化镍杂质时，问题就出现了。

structure.text: when glass contains nickel sulphide impurities

difficult_points: when 从句说明问题产生的条件。
contains 表示玻璃内部含有这种杂质。

sentences.sentence: Trace amounts of nickel and sulphur are usually present in the raw materials used to make glass, and nickel can also be introduced by fragments of nickel alloys falling into the molten glass.
sentences.translation: 制造玻璃的原材料中通常含有微量镍和硫；镍也可能由掉入熔融玻璃的镍合金碎片带入。

structure.text: Trace amounts of nickel and sulphur
are usually present in the raw materials used to make glass
and nickel can also be introduced by fragments of nickel alloys falling into the molten glass

difficult_points: used to make glass 修饰 raw materials，是过去分词后置定语。
第二分句中 can be introduced 是被动语态，falling 修饰 fragments。

sentences.sentence: As the glass is heated, these atoms react to form tiny crystals of nickel sulphide.
sentences.translation: 随着玻璃被加热，这些原子发生反应，形成微小的硫化镍晶体。

structure.text: to form tiny crystals of nickel sulphide

difficult_points: As 表示“随着”，而非单纯原因。
is heated 是被动语态；to form 表示反应的结果。

sentences.sentence: Just a tenth of a gram of nickel in the furnace can create up to 50,000 crystals.
sentences.translation: 炉中仅仅十分之一克镍，就能生成多达五万个晶体。

structure.text: Just a tenth of a gram of nickel in the furnace

difficult_points: just 强调数量极少，主语的核心是 a tenth。
up to 表示上限，可达而非一定正好达到五万。

sentences.sentence: These crystals can exist in two forms: a dense form called the alpha phase, which is stable at high temperatures, and a less dense form called the beta phase, which is stable at room temperatures.
sentences.translation: 这些晶体可以以两种形态存在：一种是高温下稳定、被称为阿尔法相的致密形态；另一种是室温下稳定、被称为贝塔相的较疏松形态。

structure.text: a dense form called the alpha phase
which is stable at high temperatures
and a less dense form called the beta phase
which is stable at room temperatures

difficult_points: 冒号后具体列举 two forms，两个 form 彼此并列。
called... 是过去分词后置定语；两个 which 分别修饰各自的 form。

sentences.sentence: The high temperatures used in the toughening process convert all the crystals to the dense, compact alpha form.
sentences.translation: 钢化过程中使用的高温会把所有晶体转化为致密紧凑的阿尔法形态。

structure.text: The high temperatures used in the toughening process
to the dense, compact alpha form

difficult_points: used in... 修饰 high temperatures，说明这些高温的用途。
convert A to B 表示把 A 转化为 B。

sentences.sentence: But the subsequent cooling is so rapid that the crystals don't have time to change back to the beta phase.
sentences.translation: 但随后的冷却速度太快，晶体没有时间变回贝塔相。

structure.text: that the crystals don't have time to change back to the beta phase

difficult_points: so + 形容词 + that 引导结果从句，表示“如此快以至于”。
have time to do 表示有时间做某事，change back 表示变回原状。

sentences.sentence: This leaves unstable alpha crystals in the glass, primed like a coiled spring, ready to revert to the beta phase without warning.
sentences.translation: 这使玻璃中留下不稳定的阿尔法晶体；它们像上紧的弹簧一样蓄势待发，随时可能毫无预兆地回复到贝塔相。

structure.text: ready to revert to the beta phase without warning

difficult_points: This 指冷却过快的结果；leave + 宾语 + 补足语表示使某物保持某状态。
primed 和 ready 都补充说明 crystals 的状态，revert to 表示回复到原来的形态。

expressions.meaning_zh: 像上紧的弹簧一样蓄势待发

sentences.sentence: When this happens, the crystals expand by up to 4%.
sentences.translation: 当这种变化发生时，晶体会膨胀多达4%。
difficult_points: this 指阿尔法晶体回复为贝塔相。
by 表示变化幅度，up to 表示最高可达4%。

sentences.sentence: And if they are within the central, tensile region of the pane, the stresses this unleashes can shatter the whole sheet.
sentences.translation: 如果它们位于玻璃板中央承受拉力的区域，这一变化释放出的应力就可能使整块玻璃碎裂。

structure.text: if they are within the central, tensile region of the pane

difficult_points: they 指 crystals；if 从句提出晶体所处位置这一条件。
this unleashes 修饰 stresses，this 指晶体膨胀，表示其释放出的应力。

sentences.sentence: The time that elapses before failure occurs is unpredictable.
sentences.translation: 故障发生前所经过的时间无法预测。
difficult_points: that 引导限制性定语从句，修饰 time。
before failure occurs 进一步修饰 elapses，说明计时终点。

sentences.sentence: It could happen just months after manufacture, or decades later, although if the glass is heated - by sunlight, for example - the process is speeded up.
sentences.translation: 它可能在制造后仅几个月发生，也可能几十年后才发生；不过，如果玻璃受热——例如受到阳光照射——这一过程会加快。

structure.text: just months after manufacture, or decades later
although if the glass is heated - by sunlight, for example - the process is speeded up

difficult_points: It 指玻璃失效；could 表示可能性，两个时间状语形成跨度对比。
although 后嵌套 if 从句，by sunlight, for example 是插入举例。

sentences.sentence: Ironically, says Graham Dodd, of consulting engineers Arup in London, the oldest pane of toughened glass known to have failed due to nickel sulphide inclusions was in Pilkington's glass research building in Lathom, Lancashire.
sentences.translation: 颇具讽刺意味的是，伦敦阿鲁普工程咨询公司的格雷厄姆·多德说，已知因硫化镍夹杂物而失效的最老一块钢化玻璃，竟在皮尔金顿位于兰开夏郡莱瑟姆的玻璃研究大楼里。

structure.text: says Graham Dodd, of consulting engineers Arup in London
the oldest pane of toughened glass
known to have failed due to nickel sulphide inclusions
in Pilkington's glass research building in Lathom, Lancashire

difficult_points: says Graham Dodd 是插入的报道语，主语要在其后寻找。
known to have failed 是过去分词短语，to have failed 表示失效发生在“被知晓”之前。

sentences.sentence: The pane was 27 years old.
sentences.translation: 这块玻璃板已有27年历史。
difficult_points: be + 数字 + years old 用于说明物体或人的年限。
The pane 指前句提到的那块最老的玻璃。

sentences.sentence: Data showing the scale of the nickel sulphide problem is almost impossible to find.
sentences.translation: 显示硫化镍问题规模的数据几乎不可能找到。

structure.text: showing the scale of the nickel sulphide problem

difficult_points: showing 是现在分词，修饰 Data，说明数据应反映什么。
impossible to find 中不定式说明“难以找到”的具体动作。

sentences.sentence: The picture is made more complicated by the fact that these crystals occur in batches.
sentences.translation: 这些晶体会成批出现这一事实，使情况变得更加复杂。

structure.text: by the fact that these crystals occur in batches
that these crystals occur in batches

difficult_points: the picture 是比喻说法，指整体情况而非图画。
that 从句解释 fact 的具体内容，occur in batches 表示成批出现。

sentences.sentence: So even if, on average, there is only one inclusion in 7 tonnes of glass, if you experience one nickel sulphide failure in your building, that probably means you've got a problem in more than one pane.
sentences.translation: 所以，即使平均每7吨玻璃中只有一个夹杂物，如果你的建筑里出现一次硫化镍失效，那也很可能意味着不止一块玻璃有问题。

structure.text: even if, on average, there is only one inclusion in 7 tonnes of glass
if you experience one nickel sulphide failure in your building
you've got a problem in more than one pane

difficult_points: 句首 even if 让步从句后又嵌入 if 条件从句，主句主语是 that。
that 指你的建筑发生一次失效这一事实；there is 是存在句。

sentences.sentence: Josie says that in the last decade he has worked on over 15 buildings with the number of failures into double figures.
sentences.translation: 乔西说，在过去十年中，他处理过15栋以上建筑，而这些建筑的失效次数都达到两位数。

structure.text: that in the last decade he has worked on over 15 buildings
with the number of failures into double figures

difficult_points: in the last decade 与现在完成时 has worked on 搭配，表示持续到现在的经历。
with + 名词短语补充 buildings 的情况；into double figures 表示达到两位数。

sentences.sentence: One of the worst examples of this is Waterfront Place, which was completed in 1990.
sentences.translation: 最严重的例子之一是Waterfront Place大厦，它于1990年建成。

structure.text: One of the worst examples of this

difficult_points: this 指前文的成批失效问题。
which 修饰 Waterfront Place，was completed 是被动语态。

sentences.sentence: Over the following decade the 40-storey Brisbane block suffered a rash of failures.
sentences.translation: 在随后的十年中，这座位于布里斯班的40层大楼接连发生大量失效。
difficult_points: Over the following decade 指紧接1990年之后的十年。
a rash of 表示短期内突然大量出现。

sentences.sentence: Eighty panes of its toughened glass shattered due to inclusions before experts were finally called in.
sentences.translation: 其钢化玻璃中有80块因夹杂物碎裂，专家最终才被请来处理。

structure.text: Eighty panes of its toughened glass
before experts were finally called in

difficult_points: its 指 Waterfront Place；due to 表示碎裂原因。
were called in 是被动短语，表示被请来协助处理。

sentences.sentence: John Barry, an expert in nickel sulphide contamination at the University of Queensland, analysed every glass pane in the building.
sentences.translation: 昆士兰大学研究硫化镍污染的专家约翰·巴里分析了大楼中的每一块玻璃板。

structure.text: an expert in nickel sulphide contamination at the University of Queensland
every glass pane in the building

difficult_points: an expert... 是 John Barry 的同位语，说明其专业身份。
every + 单数名词强调逐块检查。

sentences.sentence: Using a studio camera, a photographer went up in a cradle to take photos of every pane.
sentences.translation: 摄影师使用专业摄影机，乘坐吊篮升上去拍摄每一块玻璃。

structure.text: to take photos of every pane

difficult_points: Using... 是现在分词短语，说明摄影师采用的工具。
to take... 表示乘吊篮上去的目的，cradle 此处指高空作业吊篮。

sentences.sentence: These were scanned under a modified microfiche reader for signs of nickel sulphide crystals.
sentences.translation: 这些照片在一台改装过的缩微胶片阅读器下被扫描，以寻找硫化镍晶体的迹象。

structure.text: for signs of nickel sulphide crystals

difficult_points: These 指上一句拍摄的照片；were scanned 是被动语态。
for signs of 表示扫描的查找目标，modified 修饰 reader。

sentences.sentence: 'We discovered at least another 120 panes with potentially dangerous inclusions which were then replaced,' says Barry.
sentences.translation: “我们又发现至少120块玻璃含有潜在危险的夹杂物，随后都被替换掉了，”巴里说。

structure.text: at least another 120 panes with potentially dangerous inclusions

difficult_points: another 120 表示在此前发现的基础上再增加120块。
which 修饰 panes，were replaced 是被动语态；报道语 says Barry 后置。

sentences.sentence: 'It was a very expensive and time-consuming process that took around six months to complete.' Though the project cost A$1.6 million (nearly £700,000), the alternative - re-cladding the entire building - would have cost ten times as much.
sentences.translation: “这是一个非常昂贵且耗时的过程，完成它大约花了六个月。”尽管该项目花费了160万澳元（近70万英镑），另一种方案——给整栋大楼重新装外墙——的成本会是它的十倍。

structure.text: a very expensive and time-consuming process
that took around six months to complete
Though the project cost A$1.6 million (nearly £700,000)
the alternative - re-cladding the entire building -
would have cost ten times as much

difficult_points: 原文将引语和后续句紧连在同一条中；that 修饰 process，to complete 说明完成所需时间。
Though 引导让步从句；would have cost 表示对未采用方案的过去假设。
